REMARK: NO HEARING HELD FOR 05/05/2026 NOTICE OF EX PARTE APPLICATION FOR TEMPORARY RESTRAINING ORDER, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE RE PRELIMINARY INJUNCTION, AND RELATED RELIEF. MOVING PARTY FAILED TO COMPLY WITH CRC 3.1204(B).

LAW AND MOTION 302, PLAINTIFF KLAUS BIESENBACH'S MOTION FOR TEMPORARY RESTRAINING ORDER, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE RE PRELIMINARY INJUNCTION AND RELATED RELIEF IS OFF CALENDAR. (SEE MINI-MINUTES FOR FULL DETAILS) NO PROPOSED ORDER RECEIVED. PLAINTIFF FAILED TO PROVIDE AND FOLLOW THE COURT'S ORDER. COUNSEL FOR THE PLAINTIFF IS REQUIRED TO PREPARE A PROPOSED ORDER WHICH REPEATS VERBATIM THE COURT'S RULING AND MUST DROP A HARD COURTESY COPY IN DEPT. 302'S INBOX. JUDGE: JOSEPH M. QUINN, CLERK: M. GOODMAN, NOT REPORTED. (302/JMQ)
